_note: Delta A = trained LoRA preference accuracy vs Week 10 deterministic baseline. Metrics are not identical: baseline uses all-checks-pass on candidate_output; trained_judge uses preference accuracy (prefers_reference OR same_text) from held_out_preference_margins.jsonl. Delta B = trained LoRA vs same backbone without LoRA using the same held-out preference-margin method. Delta C is informational only and imports the external conversion-engine repo's published tau2-bench retail reference comparison without re-running tau2-bench here.
backbone_note: Operational text-only fallback: Qwen3.5-0.8B is currently multimodal and routes TRL CPO text prompts through an image processor on Colab.

confidence_interval_95.description: Paired bootstrap 95% CI (50000 resamples, seed 42) on held-out preference accuracy lift. See ablations/significance_test.txt.

delta_a.description: Trained LoRA judge (preference accuracy) vs Week 10 baseline (deterministic all-checks-pass on candidate_output) on 47 held-out tasks.

trained_judge._metric: preference accuracy: prefers ground_truth_output over candidate_output OR same_text

delta_a.caveat: icp_misclassification is 2/6 (33.3%); this category remains unresolved.

delta_b.description: Trained LoRA judge vs prompt-engineered Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct (same backbone, no LoRA)

prompt_engineered_baseline._metric: preference accuracy: base backbone prefers ground_truth_output over candidate_output OR same_text

trained_judge._metric: preference accuracy: trained LoRA prefers ground_truth_output over candidate_output OR same_text

delta_b.caveat: Delta B is strongest for gap_overclaiming and tone_drift. Prompt-only already solved dual_control_coordination and signal_overclaiming on this held-out slice.

delta_c.description: Informational public-benchmark contrast imported from the external conversion-engine repo; no tau2-bench run was executed from this repo for Delta C.
delta_c.comparison_scope: conversion-engine Act IV method (dual_control_v2) vs published tau2-bench retail leaderboard reference
delta_c.interpretation: The external tau2 retail method is +3.0pp above the published public reference. This is benchmark context, not evidence about Tenacious-Bench judge performance.
